title: ComplianceAsssessmentTypeValues
description:
Ensures customer information is properly protected.

Includes:
Data security controls
Access management
Confidentiality standards
Cybersecurity policy compliance

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Compliance Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Evaluates adherence to laws and supervisory requirements.

Includes:
Central bank regulations
Capital adequacy requirements
Liquidity standards
Consumer protection laws
Regulatory reporting accuracy

x-enumeration-literals.name: AML & CFT Compliance Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Ensures compliance with Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing rules.

Includes:
KYC (Know Your Customer) procedures
Customer due diligence (CDD)
Suspicious transaction monitoring
Sanctions screening
Reporting suspicious activities

x-enumeration-literals.name: Internal Policy Compliance Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Checks whether employees follow internal policies and procedures.

Includes:
Credit approval limits
Delegation of authority
Operational procedures
Code of conduct compliance

x-enumeration-literals.name: Operational Compliance Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Ensures processes follow regulatory and internal standards.

Includes:
Transaction processing compliance
Documentation accuracy
Record-keeping requirements
SLA adherence

x-enumeration-literals.name: Ethical & Governance Compliance Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Focuses on corporate governance and ethical standards.

Includes:
Conflict of interest management
Board oversight effectiveness
Whistleblowing systems
Transparency and disclosure practices

x-enumeration-literals.name: Audit & Control Compliance Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Conducted through internal or external audits.

Includes:
Internal control testing
Audit findings review
Issue remediation tracking
Risk control effectiveness
